span.p: Section 153: Intentionally or rashly giving provocation, with intent to cause...

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: By doing anything which is illegal

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Intending that such provocation will cause the offence of rioting to be commi...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Knowing it to be likely that such provocation will cause the offence of rioti...

span.p: The offence of rioting is committed in consequence of such provocation

span.p: The offence of rioting is not committed
